title: Norysca madagascariensis
taxonomy: Norysca madagascariensis is a species of moth in the family Geometridae. It is native to Madagascar. This species falls under the order Lepidoptera, which includes butterflies and moths. Norysca madagascariensis is further classified into the family Geometridae, commonly known as geometer moths. The family Geometridae is divided into various subfamilies, but the specific classification of Norysca madagascariensis within this family is not readily available.
